keep: AI/ML methods applied to condensed matter or materials science
Magnetism, magnetic ordering, spintronics, spin dynamics
Strongly correlated electrons (Mott, Hubbard, heavy fermions, Kondo)
Band topology, topological insulators/semimetals/magnets, Berry phase
Computational materials science (DFT, DMFT, ML interatomic potentials)
Crystal structure prediction or materials discovery via ML
discard: Pure quantum computing / quantum information (unless tied to materials)
Bioinformatics, medical imaging, NLP, computer vision
Classical engineering materials (polymers, composites) with no electronic structure angle
curation_topics.star_3: Direct ML/AI application to magnetism, topology, or correlated systems; new physics discovered via ML
curation_topics.star_2: General ML for materials/condensed matter; new computational methods applicable to these topics
